text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto hasn't been in the best condition as
of late, so we head to the shrine for a breather.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been feeling well recently, so I'm going
to go pray about it.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I won't be too long!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: All right, time to put in my shrine offering...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I put my wallet in the box by mistake! I need to
f-fish it out!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Owner
text_block_list.text:
I see youuuu! Stay right where you are, shrine
burglar!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh! You've got it wrong! I dropped my
wallet... Wait! My hand is stuck!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm free...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Aaagh?! The world is turning upside down!
Crash!

Meisho Doto pulls her hand out of the offertory
box with enough force that she backs into a
lion-dog statue.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Owner
text_block_list.text:
So, that's what happened—how unfortunate. I am
relieved to see your wallet is back in your hands,
though.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for causing so much trouble! Thank
you for reuniting me with my wallet!

text_block_list.name: Shrine Owner
text_block_list.text:
Not to change the subject, but have you offered
a prayer to the sacred tree? I believe you would
certainly receive its divine protection.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'll pray from the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what a beautiful tree. This is sure to bring me
great blessings!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm a big klutz, but I promise to do my best... so
please bestow your power unto me! Please!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Phew... Do you think this will be enough?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The wind feels so nice. Maybe the tree heard my
prayer.
choice_data_list: The sacred tree's blessing is with you.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're right. My heart feels a little lighter
now.

With her spirits lifted, Meisho Doto regains her
energy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nnngh! Please help me, please!
Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ouch... my head. I was too into the moment and
bumped my head...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Aaaagh?! Why are there so many strange bugs on
the ground?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Please, grant me salvation!

Meisho Doto encounters misfortune at every
corner, unable to regain her energy.
